generalReviewHandoff.securityHandoffSummary: General review PASS with no blockers. Changed files are documentation-only Markdown. secure-design.md provides narrative guidance with no SEC-* matrices, no Source ID rows, no scoring tables. Handoff to review-security for source-row validation confirms no security-relevant runtime behavior introduced.
generalReviewHandoff.operationalHandoffSummary: No operational evidence applicable. Documentation-only change with no runtime, deployment, or monitoring surface.

navigationSummary.notes: No executable code in this change

groupedNaSummaries.justification: Documentation-only Markdown skill files with no runtime behavior, no data processing, no authentication, no secrets, no network calls. Design classified as no-impact.
